Professional Philosophy

I am a 2nd year Computer Science student at Notre Dame University Louaize with a passion for programming and problem-solving. I aim to become a Software Engineer or AI Engineer, building efficient and impactful systems.

I am passionate about building efficient systems and continuously improving my technical skills. My goals are to become an AI Engineer or Software Developer after completing my master’s degree, where I can contribute to innovative solutions and grow within a dynamic and challenging environment.

Course Work

In the Work Ready Now course, which focused heavily on communication skills, I was encouraged to actively participate, speak in front of others, and take part in discussions regularly.

By the end of the course, I became more confident when speaking in front of others. I learned how to present my ideas in a natural and engaging way, more like a conversation rather than reading from a script.

Cover Letter

Jean-Sadou Bou Younes
+961 70 320 019
jeansadou2016@gmail.com
Beirut, Lebanon

Confidential

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to express my sincere interest in an internship or entry-level opportunity at your company. As a dedicated and motivated second-year Computer Science student at Notre Dame University, I strongly believe that I can be a valuable asset to your team.

During my current studies, I have gained strong foundational knowledge in programming, software development, object-oriented design, databases, and computer systems. I have also worked on academic projects using languages and technologies such as C++, C#, Windows Forms, UML, and software design patterns. These experiences helped me improve my problem-solving skills, logical thinking, and ability to build organized and functional software solutions.

Apart from my technical knowledge, I am a hardworking person who is eager to learn and improve. I enjoy working on challenging tasks, paying attention to details, and finding clear solutions to problems. My goal is to become an AI Engineer or a Software Developer after completing my master’s degree, and I am looking for opportunities that will help me grow professionally and gain real-world experience.

Your company would provide me with a valuable opportunity to apply what I have learned, develop new skills, and contribute positively to your team. I would be grateful for the chance to be considered for a position where I can learn, support ongoing work, and continue building my career in the technology field.

Job Reference: Internship

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background and motivation make me a strong fit for this position. Please feel free to contact me at your convenience to schedule an interview.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Jean-Sadou Bou Younes
